description: Create a 3-panel publication-ready PNG montage of the Eagle Nebula observed in three narrowband filters using AstroImageJ. Use the FITS images located at /opt/fits_samples/eagle_nebula/ (502nmos.fits, 656nmos.fits, and 673nmos.fits). The final image must be a single row of three columns at a 0.5 scale factor with slice labels enabled and contrast adjusted so nebula structures are clearly visible. Save the resulting montage to ~/AstroImages/publication/eagle_montage.png.
